descriptors: traditional Japanese calligraphy style character designs
distinctive_elements: referee background element in early games
traditional Japanese character illustrations by Eiji Shiroi
Japanese language dialogue with regional dialects

note: T2 tier data: Wikipedia source provides game information and development details but lacks specific visual design parameters (sprite dimensions, palette specifications, animation frame counts, tile vocabulary). Character design credited to Eiji Shiroi (early games) with traditional Japanese illustration style, later supplemented by Senri Kita. Genesis port released 1994 with weapon-based combat focus and Rage gauge distinctive mechanic.
